sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67635" key="mhxanopoii/+a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μηχᾰνο-ποιΐα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n67635.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">construction of engines of war</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:10:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
